evidenceOrRepro: packages/cli/src/commands/framework-development/closure-packet-schema/implementation.ts was created during TASK-RFT-0034 to preserve behavior while satisfying the immediate facade split and line-count gate.
followUp: Open follow-up refactor cards to expand closure-packet-schema/implementation.ts into typed schema, validation, creation, repair, and evidence modules while keeping tests/cli/closure-packet-schema-extraction.test.ts green.
